PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Experienced Full Stack Developer with 5 years of expertise in building scalable web applications using React, Node.js, and AWS. Strong background in database design, REST API development, and team collaboration. Passionate about clean code and agile methodologies.

Languages: JavaScript, Python, TypeScript, SQL, HTML/CSS

Tools: Git, Jenkins, Jira, Webpack, Postman
